requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety and Market Readiness — TIS / IEC 60335-2-40
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全与市场就绪——TIS / IEC 60335-2-40
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全與市場就緒——TIS / IEC 60335-2-40

summary.en: Thailand references TIS safety requirements consistent with IEC 60335-2-40 for household and similar appliances, including heat pumps, air conditioners, and dehumidifiers. Relevant scope includes electrical clearances, installation interfaces, protection against electric shock, overcurrent protection, and refrigerant-related electrical hazard handling. Thailand grid frequency is 50 Hz, matching China, and common Thai supply voltages align at 220 V single-phase and 380 V three-phase, so voltage-frequency adaptation is usually not required on 50 Hz products.
summary.zh: 泰国安全要求参考家用与类似用途电器TIS安全条款（对应IEC 60335-2-40），覆盖热泵、空调和除湿机。相关范围包括绝缘、安全距离、安装接口、电击防护、过流防护及制冷剂相关电气危险控制。泰国电网为50赫兹，与中国一致，且常见供电为220伏单相和380伏三相，通常不需要频率和电压改造。
summary.zht: 泰國安全要求參考家用與類似用途電器TIS安全條款（對應IEC 60335-2-40），覆蓋熱泵、空調和除濕機。相關範圍包括絕緣、安全距離、安裝介面、電擊防護、過流防護及製冷劑相關電氣危險控制。泰國電網為50赫茲，與中國一致，且常見供電為220伏單相和380伏三相，通常不需要頻率與電壓改造。

standards_or_laws: TIS IEC 60335-2-40 (air conditioner and heat pump family safety requirements)
Thailand supply voltage practice in market-facing products

summary.en: China applies GB 4706.32 and related national safety standards for heat pumps and AC equipment, with safety reporting under GB frameworks. The Chinese standard base may lag current international baselines and is not an automatic substitute for Thailand market acceptance evidence.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 4706.32及相关国家安全标准进行热泵和空调设备安全要求，并按GB体系出具报告。中国标准基线可能低于当前国际版本，且不自动替代泰国市场接受证据。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 4706.32及相關國家安全標準進行熱泵和空調設備安全要求，並按GB體系出具報告。中國標準基線可能低於當前國際版本，且不自動替代泰國市場接受證據。

gap.en: The voltage-frequency gap is not generally present versus China, but safety evidence and Thai market administration paths are not interchangeable. Chinese test reports often need Thailand-specific review if Thai importers require TISI-aligned evidence.
gap.zh: 与中国相比电压频率通常不存在差距，但安全证据和泰国市场管理路径并不互认。中国测试报告通常需要按TISI管理路径进行泰国侧复核或补证。
gap.zht: 與中國相比電壓頻率通常不存在差距，但安全證據和泰國市場管理路徑並不互認。中國測試報告通常需要按TISI管理路徑進行泰國側複核或補證。

mandatory_status.target: mandatory for imported heat pump appliances in Thai market scope
mandatory_status.cn: mandatory within China market safety framework; not automatically export-equivalent

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No 50 Hz or 220/380 V gap versus China, but TIS-based safety evidence is required for Thailand market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 与中国相比50赫兹及220/380伏无电压差距，但泰国入市仍需以TIS路径形成的安全证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 與中國相比50赫茲及220/380伏無電壓差距，但泰國入市仍需以TIS路徑形成的安全證據。
